name: ESOPHAGEAL INTRAMURAL PSEUDODIVERTICULOSIS
definition: dilated excretory ducts of deep mucous glands
dominant_finding: appear to "float" outside esophagus without apparent communication with lumen
discriminating_features: long stricture in cervical / upper thoracic esophagus (classic)
multiple tiny rounded / flask-shaped barium collections in longitudinal rows parallel to long
appear to "float" outside esophagus without apparent communication with lumen

general: multiple tiny rounded / flask-shaped barium collections in longitudinal rows parallel to long
appear to "float" outside esophagus without apparent communication with lumen
